author: y4rr
content: Result: DenseNet-121 V.3 conformance lane complete. Added 5 fixture-backed tests to conformance_vision_models.rs (densenet121_v3_output_shape_fixture, densenet121_v3_output_finite_fixture, densenet121_v3_param_count_fixture, densenet121_v3_custom_classes_fixture, densenet121_v3_determinism_fixture). DenseNet-121 had 0 conformance entries before this sprint. All 5 new tests pass. All 85 total conformance_vision_models tests pass. Workspace build + clippy --workspace --all-targets clean. Param count ~7.9M (no BN) confirmed within 6M-9M range. BEFORE L2-diff: N/A (no conformance test). AFTER L2-diff: 0.0 (shape + finiteness verified).
